chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 25 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.110/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.08.2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon associate of Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondent No.5 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>>...<<<<<<< A progress report has been furnished by respondent No.5 / Chairman Town Committee, Mehrabpur, is taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner states that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, as he has been given joining, therefore, under instructions he does not press the present petition, however, states that his salary has also been paid in accordance with the law. With these directions, the petition stands disposed of along with pending application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
